problem id: 1bcd2b16
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHR(1)

examples:
  11011000 -> 01101100
  01111101 -> 00111110
  11110101 -> 01111010
  01011110 -> 00101111
  11001111 -> 01100111
  00011010 -> 00001101
  00100000 -> 00010000
  01111100 -> 00111110
  10011100 -> 01001110

query: 00001011
predicted answer: 00000101
